The Puritans, a group of English Reformed Protestants, were known for their austere and strict religious practices, which often set them apart from the broader English society of their time. Their distinctive appearance, which included the bowl-cut hairstyle, became a symbol of their religious and cultural identity. Isolation of cellulose acetate from ripper waste is insufficient to provide a recycled product of high commercial utility. During the manufacture of cigarettes, the cellulose acetate is treated with a plasticizer which improves the mechanical performance of the finished filter. The cellulose acetate may also be treated with flavorants, for example, menthol, and the cellulose acetate will absorb some levels of nicotine and other substances from the tobacco. If the cellulose acetate/plasticizer/flavors mixture is dissolved in a typical cellulose ester solvent, and reformed into a product, these extraneous substances will change both the mechanical and the sensory properties of the cellulose acetate, thereby reducing the overall quality of products manufactured with these recycled materials. The exhibit has been popular with museum visitors, Stephanie Kelley, the museum's communications manager, said in a statement. "We've had a fantastic response to this exhibition," she noted. "Visitors have enjoyed seeing these iconic images up close and personal." The exhibition features the work of renowned photographers such as Harry Benson, Annie Leibovitz, Lynn Goldsmith, and Ethan Russell, who captured intimate moments and historic performances of rock's biggest stars. Among the highlights are Harry Benson’s photographs of The Beatles during their early tours, including the playful "Pillowfight 1964" image, and Annie Leibovitz’s striking portraits of musicians like John Lennon and Yoko Ono. For those who haven't had a chance to see the exhibit yet, this weekend is the perfect opportunity. The museum will be open regular hours through Sunday, May 5, giving visitors one last chance to immerse themselves in the visual history of rock and roll. "Sound and Vision: Monumental Rock & Roll Photography" has provided a unique glimpse into the lives and performances of some of music's most legendary figures," Kelley added. "It’s been a fantastic addition to our exhibition schedule, and we encourage everyone to come see it before it closes." texts.full_text: ent both contrast-enhanced CT and SPIO-enhanced MR imaging were retrospectively analyzed. Twenty-one of the 38 patients had 61 metastases. Seventeen of the 61 metastases were confirmed histologically; the remaining 44 metastases were defined with imaging follow-up. At MR imaging, SPIO-enhanced heavily T1-weighted images, T2*-weighted gradient echo images, and T2-weighted fast spin-echo images were evaluated. Contrast-enhanced multi-detector row CT images obtained in the portal phase were evaluated. Four blinded observers independently reviewed CT images, MR images, and the combination of CT and MR images. Diagnostic accuracy was evaluated by using the alternative free-response receiver operating characteristic (AFROC) method. Sensitivities and positive predictive values were also analyzed with the Fisher protected least significant difference test and generalized estimating equations. The mean area under the AFROC curve for the combined approach (0.70) was significantly higher than that for SPIO-enhanced MR imaging alone (0.58, P < .05, Fisher protected least significant difference test), and there was no significant difference between each of them and that for contrast-enhanced CT alone (0.66). For all lesions, the mean sensitivity of combined imaging (0.59) was significantly higher than that of CT (0.48) or MR imaging (0.43) alone (P < .05, Fisher protected least significant difference test and generalized estimating equations). For all lesions, the mean positive predictive values were 0.82, 0.89, and 0.81, for combined MR and CT, CT alone, and MR alone, respectively. texts.full_text: my confession of faith. I chose to associate with other young people who would assist me in my faith journey. In those years, Adventist young people were organized into Missionary Volunteer Societies, and I was given the task of leading the local group. A lovely young woman was chosen as the assistant leader. Working together, Shirley and I became close friends, and shortly before receiving my Ph.D. degree, we married. Thirty-eight years later, I am still convinced that this was among the best choices I have ever made. From New York we moved to Andrews University, where I joined the chemistry department. There our two sons were born. Now one is an electrical engineer and the other a physician. Each has found a lovely wife, welcome additions to our family. While still in graduate school, I was able to bring my mother to New York to live with me. Although she has not been able to rid herself completely of the demons of World War II, time and the peaceful surroundings have been therapeutic. As she is approaching her 98th birthday, I am reminded that her bravery in World War II and her decision to become a Christian were two of the most decisive factors of my life. Those of us who are blessed

In her career as a storyteller, Sònia has worked with many local communities and organisations, like the Wee Spanish Mobile Library, The Hidden Gardens, the Swap Market, the Forestry Commission, Playbase and Glasgow Women’s Library, and she has also performed internationally in Scotland, England, Spain, the Netherlands and Belgium. Her most recent work includes the final development of What I Know (about what my Grandfather didn’t know). Based on her personal story, this show is the result of Sònia’s research on her exiled Great-Grandfather and the intergenerational trauma that the family has carried since the Spanish Civil War. Acclaimed by audiences, and with a four stars review by The Herald, the show has been performed in Edinburgh, Glasgow and Amsterdam. texts.full_text: of [[Jerusalem]]. Today's small underground tomb is situated at [[Gethsemane]], next to the [[Mount of Olives]] where the Saviour often prayed with His disciples. It was there that the [[Apostles]] gathered and buried the most-pure body of the [[Theotokos|Mother of God]]. Her [[icon]] remains there as an endless spring of blessings for all the Christians, celebrated (or venerated) by the name 'Panagia Ierosolimitissa'. + '''''Panagia Ierosolymitissa''''' (Gr. Ιεροσολυμίτισσα - Most Holy Lady of Jerusalem) is a very popular [[icon]] of the [[Theotokos]] because it overlooks the empty tomb of the Most Holy Theotokos at the Sepulcher of the Mother of God in Gethsemane—blessing the numerous pilgrims visiting the [[Holy Land]] of [[Jerusalem]]. texts.full_text: the system is using a minimal locale without UTF-8 support. --- ### 2. Set a UTF-8 Compatible Locale OpenWrt 12.09 likely has limited locale support by default. To use UTF-8, you may need to: #### a) Install a UTF-8 Locale If the `en_US.UTF-8` locale is not already available, you can install it using: ```bash opkg update opkg install glibc-locales ``` Then generate the locale: ```bash localedef -i en_US -f UTF-8 en_US.UTF-8 ``` #### b) Set the New Locale Edit `/etc/profile` or your shell's configuration file (e.g., `~/.profile`) to set the locale: ```bash export LANG=en_US.UTF-8 export LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 ``` Reboot or re-login for the changes to take effect. --- ### 3. Fix the Shell Prompt (Optional) The prompt (`PS1`) might contain non-ASCII characters (e.g., arrows, symbols) that fail to render properly. Edit the shell configuration (e.g., `/etc/profile` or `/root/.bashrc`) to use ASCII-only characters. For example, change: ```bash PS1="[\u@\h \W]\\$ " ``` To a simpler version: ```bash PS1="[\u@\h] $ " ``` --- ### 4. SSH Client-Side Fixes If the issue persists, ensure your SSH client is using the correct terminal type and encoding: #### a) Use `-t` to Force a Pseudo-Terminal ```bash ssh -t root@192.168.1.1 ``` #### b) Set Terminal Encoding On your local machine, configure your terminal emulator to use UT

texts.full_text: conducted to determine the distribution and abundance of black carp in the Mississippi River Basin (personal communication, Leo Nico, USGS). During 2003 and 2004, Schramm and Basler (2005) employed AC electrofishing gear to sample selected waterways in proximity to open-pond aquaculture facilities in Arkansas, Louisiana, and Mississippi. Presumably because the effectiveness of electrofishing is largely limited to near-shore habitats and other shallow waters, the researchers concluded that the absence of black carp in their samples did not necessarily demonstrate an absence of black carp in the rivers sampled. According to informatioin in Nico et al. (2005), because black carp typically inhabit the bottom, electrofishing would not be effective for the collection of black carp in large, deep rivers. According to Nico et al. (2005), there appears to be no existing, economically feasible method to completely eliminate black carp populations once they escape into large river systems. Impact of Introduction: There is high potential that the black carp would negatively impact native aquatic communities by feeding on, and reducing, populations of native mussels and snails, many of which are considered endangered or threatened (Nico et al. 2005). Given their size and diet preferences, black carp have the potential to restructure benthic communities by direct predation and removal of algae-grazing snails. Mussel beds consisting of smaller individuals and juvenile recruits are probably most vulnerable to being consumed by black carp (Nico et al. 2005). Furthermore, based on the fact that black carp attain a large size (well over 1 meter long), both juvenile and adult mussels and snails of many species would be vulnerable to predation by this fish (Nico et al. 2005). texts.full_text: name Here is an example htaccess code to accomplish this: ```apacheconf RewriteEngine On # Replace 'customword' with any custom word you want rewriteBase / CustomWord=Custom Word ## Internal redirect, add the base URL and remove trailing slash if there's a request for www.mydomian/userregister RewriteCond %{THE_REQUEST} ^[A-Z]{3,9}\s/+customword/?\sHTTP [NC] RewriteRule .* /$1 # Add 'CustomWord' to the beginning of all requests ## External redirect: append Custom Word before any request that is not for www.mydomian/ or its subdirectories RewriteCond %{REQUEST_URI} !^/(customword|subdirectory) [NC] RewriteRule .* customword%{ REQUEST URI } ``` In this code snippet, we first set the `CustomWord` variable to your desired word (e.g., 'mydomain'). Then: 1.Internal Redirect: We use a regular expression (`RewriteCond`) and rewrite rule(`rewriteBase / Custom Word RewriteRule .* $ 0)to internally redirect any request that starts with `/customword/` back to the original URL, effectively removing `CustomWord` from such requests. This ensures you can access pages like wwwmydomiancomuserregister without having totypewww mydomain com custom word user register 2.External Redirect: For all other URLs (i.e., not startingwith/customeword or /subdirectory), we use another rewrite rule (`RewriteCond %{REQUEST_URI} !^/(customWord| subdirectory) [NC] RewriteRule.* Custom Word%{ REQUEST URI }`)to append `Custom word` before the URL, ensuring that all requests are rewritten to include it. texts.full_text: Mokum Records Mokum Records is a Dutch independent record label specialising in early hardcore and hardcore releases. They have released about 100 single and EP vinyl records between 1993 and 1999 and more than 80 since 2004. Fred Berkhout (Freddy B) created Mokum Records in 1993 as a joke response to another record label, Rotterdam Records. The label was originally part of the record store Boudisque Records, but was later merged with Roadrunner Records - part of The Island Def Jam Music Group - who closed the label in 1998 because vinyl cost more than it yielded and decided to stop releasing with the medium. The label was revived by Freddy B in 2004 due to the re-emergence of the hardcore scene in the early 2000s, especially with gabber's resurgence in popularity in 2002. (catalog releases starting at 100 reflect this). Mokum Records achieved chart success all over the world in 1995 with Technohead and their No. 1 hit "I Wanna Be a Hippy", the No. 1 hit "Have You Ever Been Mellow" by the Party Animals, and Technohead's "Happy Birthday", which followed in 1996. The Party Animals would also go on to have two more consecutive #1 hits with "Hava Naquila" and "Aquarius", making them the first ever Dutch act to have their firs three singles all reach number one on a national chart without an album release in between any of those tracks. The label's success is not limited to its home country, as it has also seen international recognition for artists like Charly Lownoise & Mental Theo with "Wonderful Days", which reached #51 in the UK Singles Chart and sparked a short-lived trend known as 'Gabber House', characterized by faster beats per minute (BPM) than usual house music. Mokum Records is often considered one of the most influential labels to shape early Dutch hardcore sound, with its releases serving as anthems for ravers and clubbers alike dur

texts.full_text: (mCRc), particularly those presenting peritoneal carcinomatosis: 1. Systemic Chemotherapy: Standard treatment often involves systemic chemotherapy regimens, which can be tailored based on genetic markers such as KRAS and BRAF mutations. 2. Targeted Therapies: - Anti-EGFR therapies (e.g., cetuximab or panitumium) for patients with RAS wild-type tumors. - Bevacizumab, an antiangiogenic agent that can be used in combination therapy to inhibit tumor blood supply. 3. Immunotherapy: Immune checkpoint inhibitors have shown promise and are being investigated further as part of treatment regimens for mCRC without specific genetic alterations like mismatch repair deficiency (dMMR) or high microsatellite instability (MSI-H). 4. Hyperthermic Intraperitoneal Chemoperfusion (HIPEC): This is a surgical technique used to administer heated chemotherapy directly into the abdominal cavity during surgery, which may be beneficial for patients with isolated peritoneal metastasis. 5. Oncolytic Virus Therapy: Experimental approaches such as oncolytic virus therapy are being explored in clinical trials and might provide novel treatment avenues by targeting cancer cells specifically while sparing normal tissues. 6. Combination Approaches: - Combining surgical resection with neoadjuvant or adjuvant systemic therapies to enhance the effectiveness of surgery. - Integrating radiotherapy, where applicable, especially for local control in cases involving other organ metastases like liver involvement alongside peritoneal spread. The management and treatment strategies continue evolving as more research is conducted. Personalized medicine approaches are increasinGly significant due to advancements allowing better genetic profiling which guides therapy decisions. In conclusion, the multidisciplinary approach remains critical not only at diagnosis but throughout all stages of disease progression in mCrC patients with metastatic involvement including peritoneal carcinomatosis. EPA determined that there are risks to workers and occupational non-users (ONU) from ten out of 14 conditions of use. EPA found no risks to the environment, consumers, or the general public. EPA is now moving to the risk management step in the TSCA process by working to draft regulations to protect public health from the unreasonable risks identified in the final risk evaluation. According to EPA, the Regulatory Flexibility Act requires agencies to establish an SBAR Panel for rules that may have a significant economic impact on a substantial number of small entities. The SBAR Panel will include federal representatives from the Small Business Administration (SBA), the Office of Management and Budget (OMB), and EPA. The SBAR Panel will select SERs to provide comments on behalf of their company, community, or organization and advise the Panel on the potential impacts of the proposed rule on small entities. EPA states that it is seeking self-nominations directly from the small entities that may be subject to the rule’s requirements. EPA notes that other representatives, such as trade associations that exclusively or at least primarily represent potentially regulated small entities, may also serve as SERs. His journey to Major League Baseball (MLB) was marked by perseverance and patience, as he spent eleven seasons in the minors before making his MLB debut with the Chicago White Sox from 1943 to 1946. At age 30, after waiting a decade-plus for his opportunity, Curtright had one standout season in 1943 where he hit .291, ranking sixth in the American League. Curtright's MLB career with the White Sox lasted from 1943 to 1946. After leaving the White Sox, it appears he continued playing baseball but did not feature prominently in MLB beyond those years. The use of an optical system of this kind for image rotation in conjunction with a film camera means that when an image rotation is required it is no longer necessary to rotate the entire film camera about the optical axis so that the film camera can be operated as normal and the eyepiece as well as all operating elements of the film camera remain in their standard position. The use of standard lenses and standard accessories is thereby guaranteed and these can be fitted on hand-held systems or on systems fixed to the body of the cameraman. From U.S. Pat. No. 4,427,269 a method and device are known for automatically compensating the image rotation through an articulated optical system which consists of members with lenses for the optical representation as well as articulated joints with mirrors or prisms for deflecting the beam path. In order to compensate the image rotation when the articulated optical system rotates a signal is generated whose polarity is dependent on the direction of rotation of the image produced in an observation plane relative to an object. From this signal a compensation element mounted in the beam path of the articulated optical system is controlled and actuated until the signal disappears. The compensation element consists of an optical element for image rotation formed as a Dove prism and mounted inside one tube of the several interconnected tubes of the articulated optical system and connected through gearing to a motor mounted outside of the tube and controlled by a servo booster. The servo booster receives a signal from a signal processor which is connected to a sensor mounted on the observation plane and on which an image is depicted of marKings arranged inside or outside an intermediate image.
